chapter_title.en: Repentance, Seeking Forgiveness, Regret, and Admission (of Guilt)

parts.text: أبي عبد الله عليه السلام: قال

text: من قال ثلاثا: سبحان ربى العظيم وبحمده استغفر الله ربى وأتوب إليه، قرعت العرش كما تقرع السلسلة الطشت.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 18.Ḥammād ibn ʿĪsā narrated from Ibrāhīm ibn ʿUmar, from Abū ʿAbdillāh (a) who said, “Whoever says three times, ‘Glory be to my Lord, the Great, and praise be to Him. I seek forgiveness from my Lord and turn penitently to Him,’ the Throne [of Allah] makes a sound like the sound of chains striking a bowl.”
